cuts.name: wine_bottle_secret_reveal
cuts.label: Cut 1 — The Hidden Label
cuts.hook: Creator holds up a wine bottle and says 'Wait — did you know this bottle is literally saving nature?' while flipping it around to reveal the back label.
cuts.vibe: Playful and disbelieving, like you just discovered something you can't believe isn't more widely known. Feels like a genuine 'why didn't anyone tell me this?' moment.

cuts.name: nature_guilt_plot_twist
cuts.label: Cut 2 — The Guilt-Free Glass
cuts.hook: Aerial drone shot of a lush forest cuts to a close-up of a wine glass being poured, with the creator voicing over: 'What if your Friday night glass of wine actually helped protect this?'
cuts.vibe: Quietly thought-provoking and wonder-filled. Slows the viewer down with a contrast that feels almost too good to be true — and then proves it is true.

cuts.name: price_tag_comparison_hook
cuts.label: Cut 3 — The Unexpected Math
cuts.hook: Creator stands in a wine aisle, picks up two bottles of similar price, and says: 'Same price. One of them funds nature conservation. Can you guess which one most people grab?'
cuts.vibe: Sharp and a little provocative, tapping into the curiosity of social comparison. Feels like a mini social experiment that makes the viewer question their own default habits.
